key_content_points: T-axiom valid under reflexive, invalid under strict
Seriality/density trivial under reflexive, require frame properties under strict
Frame class separation preserved only under strict
Irreflexivity is not modally definable (Blackburn, de Rijke, Venema)
TM currently uses strict; Task 29 investigates switch to reflexive
